lines.speaker: Wizard Cromperty
lines.text: Hello there. My name is Cromperty. I am a Wizard, and an inventor.

lines.speaker: Wizard Cromperty
lines.text: There you go, [amount] free pure essence. Return tomorrow for some more.

lines.speaker: Wizard Cromperty
lines.text: I've already given you your free allowance for today. Come back to me tomorrow for some more.

lines.speaker: Wizard Cromperty
lines.text: You must be [player name]. My good friend Sedridor has told me about you. As both wizard and inventor, he has aided me in my great invention!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Two jobs? That's got to be tough.

lines.speaker: Wizard Cromperty
lines.text: Not when you combine them it isn't! I invent MAGIC things!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Well, I shall leave you to your inventing.

lines.speaker: Wizard Cromperty
lines.text: Thanks for dropping by! Stop again anytime!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: So what have you invented?

lines.speaker: Wizard Cromperty
lines.text: Ah! My latest invention is my patent pending teleportation block! It emits a low level magical signal, that will allow me to locate it anywhere in the world, and teleport anything

lines.speaker: Wizard Cromperty
lines.text: directly to it! I hope to revolutionise the entire teleportation system! Don't you think I'm great? Uh, I mean it's great?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: So where is the other block?

lines.speaker: Wizard Cromperty
lines.text: Well... Hmm. I would guess somewhere between here and the Wizards' Tower in Misthalin. All I know is that it hasn't got there yet as the wizards there would have contacted me.

lines.speaker: Wizard Cromperty
lines.text: I'm using the GPDT for delivery. They assured me it would be delivered promptly.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Who are the GPDT?

lines.speaker: Wizard Cromperty
lines.text: The Gielinor Parcel Delivery Team. They come very highly recommended. Their motto is: 'We aim to deliver your stuff at some point after you have paid us!'

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Can I be teleported please?

lines.speaker: Wizard Cromperty
lines.text: By all means! I'm afraid I can't give you any specifics as to where you will come out however. Presumably wherever the other block is located.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Yes, that sounds good. Teleport me!

lines.speaker: Wizard Cromperty
lines.text: Okey dokey! Ready?

lines.speaker: Wizard Cromperty
lines.text: Hmmm.... that's odd... I can't seem to get a signal...

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Oh well, never mind.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: That sounds dangerous. Leave me here.

lines.speaker: Wizard Cromperty
lines.text: As you wish.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Well done, that's very clever.

lines.speaker: Wizard Cromperty
lines.text: Yes it is isn't it? Forgive me for feeling a little smug, this is a major breakthrough in the field of teleportation!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Can you teleport me to the Rune Essence?

lines.speaker: Wizard Cromperty
lines.text: Seventior disthine molenko!

lines.speaker: Wizard Cromperty
lines.text: Here you go.

lines.speaker: Wizard Cromperty
lines.text: Your magical prowess... it is most impressive.
